product.one_line_description: The Amazon Selling Partner API provides a comprehensive set of tools for sellers and vendors to programmatically manage various aspects of their Amazon business operations, including listings, orders, fulfillment, reports, and finances.

authentication.auth_summary: The API documentation has sections for "Authorization" and "Tokens API", indicating a mechanism for authorizing applications and managing tokens is present. The specific authentication method (e.g., OAuth2, API key) is not explicitly stated in the provided content.

developer_access.access_notes: Developer access requires registration, and the status of a "Developer Registration Request" can be checked, suggesting a human or administrative review and approval process before credentials can be obtained. "Third-Party Provider Registration" also implies a specific vetting process.

api_surface.api_summary: The Amazon Selling Partner API offers a broad range of functionalities covering A+ content, Amazon Warehousing and Distribution, app integrations, catalog items, customer feedback, data kiosk, delivery, Easy Ship, external fulfillment, FBA, feeds, finances, fulfillment inbound/outbound, invoicing, listings, merchant fulfillment, messaging, notifications, orders, product fees, pricing, replenishment, reports, sales, seller wallet, sellers, services, shipment invoicing, shipping, solicitations, supply sources, tokens, uploads, vehicles, and various vendor-specific APIs. It provides SDKs and offers OpenAPI specifications for AI agents.

mcp.mcp_summary: An official Model Context Protocol (MCP) is available for AI agents, providing an index of all pages formatted in Markdown and endpoints in OpenAPI at the specified URL.

buildability.primary_blocker: Requires vendor/support approval for admin credentials.
buildability.verdict_reasoning: [PROVISIONAL V1] Admin gated access explicitly requires external vendor authorization.
